title: Flavorful Roasted Turkish Prawns Revani
description: A hearty one-pot Turkish dish featuring roasted prawns and earthy flavors, perfect for a special occasion dinner, this dish is onion and garlic free.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, tomato paste, smoked paprika, thyme, salt, and pepper.
Add the thawed prawns to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Transfer the prawns and marinade to a large oven-safe skillet or Dutch oven.
Roast the prawns in the preheated oven for 8 minutes or until they turn pink.
Remove the skillet from the oven and stir in the chicken broth.
Prepare the revani cake mix according to the package instructions using the skillet broth as the liquid ingredient.
Pour the revani cake mix over the roasted prawns and return the skillet to the oven.
Bake for an additional 20 minutes or until the cake is golden brown and the prawns are cooked through.
